text: 100g of fat. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for this category, the real question is fat quality.
0g of carbs. everything else here is pretty flat. not relevant here.
0g of protein. the rest of the section is nothing special. also not relevant here.
the rest of the section is nothing special.
minerals are basically not adding much here.

on the plus side: strong cooking-stability case. tests whether practical cooking arguments can rescue brutal fat chemistry. simple ingredient identity. cleaner than industrial spreads. strong healthy-food halo. likely audience argument magnet.

on the weaker side: saturated fat is extreme. this should hammer it hard if the category means what it says. overall fat profile is weak. very poor fit for an elite fats ranking. health reputation can outrun the data. useful editorial counterweight.
D tier. Best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
